positive.prompt: Draft a commit message for these changes
Write a conventional commit for this refactor
Review my git history hygiene and suggest better commit messages

negative.prompt: Write a failing test for this bug before fixing it
Add test coverage before refactoring this module

evals.prompt: Commit the staged changes: a fix for null handling in the parser.
evals.expected_output: A conventional commit message like fix(parser): handle null input
expectations: The commit message follows the conventional commits format
The summary line is imperative and under 72 characters
